files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,416 @@
+---
+source: crates/ffs-harness/src/benchmark_taxonomy.rs
+expression: json
+---
+{
+  "version": 1,
+  "operations": {
+    "block_cache_arc_compile_like": {

+      "family": "block_cache",

+    },

+      "family": "degraded_mode",
+      "metric": "throughput",

+    "degraded_throughput_warning_read": {
+      "operation_id": "degraded_throughput_warning_read",
+      "family": "degraded_mode",
+      "metric": "throughput",

+    "degraded_throughput_warning_write": {
+      "operation_id": "degraded_throughput_warning_write",
+      "family": "degraded_mode",
